# Reflections

> A private, writing-first wellness journal. No streaks, no pressure, no automatic AI.

## What it is
Reflections is a journaling app where users write notes, name their mood, tag patterns, and optionally use AI to receive reflections or refresh their Life Wiki.

## Who it's for
People who want a calm place to think in writing — without gamification, public sharing, or AI that runs without being asked.

## Key features
- Private rich-text journal with mood tracking, tags, tasks, and attachments
- Life Wiki: AI-generated pages that grow from saved writing when the user asks
- AI Reflections for moments when users want another lens on a note
- Ambient soundscapes, whisper-to-text, focus mode, breathing exercises
- Future Letters: write to your future self
- Available as web app, PWA, and Android APK

## Pricing
- Free: 30 notes/month, one AI reflection sample, one Life Wiki refresh after enough writing
- Pro weekly: ₹49/week after a 3-day trial
- Pro monthly: ₹149/month after a 3-day trial
